facilities.name: Northwest County Solid Waste Facility
facilities.hours: Hillsborough County posts current disposal facility hours on its waste disposal facility page. Confirm before visiting.
facilities.fees: Fees and public drop-off rules vary by load type and residency. Confirm the current county guidance before arrival.
facilities.rules: Use the county page to confirm accepted materials, residency rules, and self-haul instructions before driving.

facilities.name: South County Household Hazardous Waste Collection
facilities.hours: Check Hillsborough County for current hazardous-waste collection hours and accepted-item rules before visiting.
facilities.fees: Household hazardous waste service is generally resident-focused. Confirm current eligibility and item limits before arrival.
not_accepted: Materials outside posted household program rules
facilities.rules: Use the county disposal facility page to confirm hazardous-waste service availability, packaging rules, and proof-of-residency requirements before you drive.
